methods.name: Stage-Progression
methods.rationale: Applies typical Series A → next-stage step-up multiplier (2.0x) to $106M total raised proxy.

methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.rationale: Median across 6 same-sector + same/adjacent-stage peers in Biotech & Health. Range: $100M - $3.3B.

methods.name: Public-Comp Anchoring
methods.skip_reason: target revenue not on file (private companies rarely disclose)
methods.rationale: Public Biotech & Health P/S median is 6.1x across 3 tickers. Cannot apply without target's revenue.

public.rationale: Public-co frontier-tech comp in Biotech & Health
Public-co frontier-tech comp in Biotech & Health
Public-co frontier-tech comp in Biotech & Health

data.narrative:
Until is a Series A biotech company founded by Laura Deming and Hunter Davis that has raised $106M to date. The valuation analysis draws from a universe of 8 private peers and 3 public comparables in the Biotech & Health sector, including stage-adjacent companies such as Eikon Therapeutics ($3.3B, Series B), Xaira Therapeutics ($2.7B, Seed), and Neko Health ($1.8B, Series B).

Two quantitative methods triangulate the valuation. Stage-progression analysis applies a 2.0x step-up multiplier typical of Series A advancement, yielding $212M. Peer-median anchoring across six same-sector and adjacent-stage companies produces $1.3B, with a range of $100M to $3.3B. Public-comp anchoring was not applicable due to the absence of revenue disclosure for Until; the reference sector carries a 6.1x price-to-sales median across three public tickers (RXRX, TEM, ONT.L), but cannot be operationalized without target financials.

These methods support a valuation range of $180M (low) to $1.5B (high), with a median of $756M. The wide spread reflects stage and maturity variance within the peer set and material uncertainty around Until's commercial trajectory relative to better-capitalized or later-stage comparables. The peer-median approach carries particular weight given the robust sample size, though investor selectivity and capital efficiency within frontier biotech warrant close examination of burn rate and clinical progress indicators.
